name: Lumière Hair Studio
tagline: Modern cuts, balayage, and color in a calm Pearl District studio.
about: Lumière is a boutique hair studio in Portland's Pearl District. Our stylists specialize in lived-in color, precision cuts, and balayage that grows out beautifully. We keep our chairs limited so every guest gets unhurried, one-on-one attention — and a great cup of coffee while you're with us.

heroImage.alt: A bright, modern hair salon interior

aboutImage.alt: A stylist working on a client's hair

services.name: Cut & Style
services.description: Consultation, precision cut, and a finish you can recreate at home.

services.name: Balayage & Color
services.description: Hand-painted, lived-in color tailored to your tone and lifestyle.

services.name: Treatments
services.description: Bond-building and gloss treatments to keep color vibrant and hair healthy.

gallery.alt: Close-up of a fresh balayage color result
A stylist blow-drying a client's hair

testimonials.quote: Best balayage I've ever had — it still looked great four months later.
testimonials.author: Anya P.

testimonials.quote: Calm, unhurried, and genuinely talented stylists. I won't go anywhere else.
testimonials.author: Devon M.
